/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/walper.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/walper.dir/walper_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/walper.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/walper.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/walper.dir/src/filedialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/walper.dir/qrc_translations.cpp.o -o walper  /usr/lib/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.19 /usr/lib/libQt5Core.so.5.15.19
